T+15
完了

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 147px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 1: 検知 / 起動 (2 分)
・PagerDuty Sev2 通知
・Incident Commander 立ち上げ
・Slack #k1s0-incidents 招集
・自動 / 手動 rollback 判定

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 147px; margin-left: 322px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 2: Git revert (3 分)
・ops/scripts/rollback.sh 起動
・対象 Application を特定
・git revert
・自動生成 PR を SRE 承認
・main マージ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 147px; margin-left: 582px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 3: Argo CD sync (5 分)
・argocd app sync
・prev-sha への巻き戻し
・Helm chart 再展開
・Pod 入替（Rollout undo）
・kubectl argo rollouts undo（並列）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 147px; margin-left: 842px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 4: AnalysisTemplate (5 分)
・5 本共通テンプレ評価
・error rate / latency / cpu
・dependency / EB burn
・全 pass = 安定化 OK
・任意 fail = 第二経路へ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 147px; margin-left: 1102px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 5: 安定化観測 (5 分)
・post-rollback ダッシュボード
・SLI 5 分連続 GREEN 確認
・PagerDuty resolve
・Postmortem PR テンプレ生成
・15 分以内完了 SLO 計測

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 842px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第二経路: Forward fix
AT fail 時に 5 分以内で hot-patch
（CVSS 9.0+ 限定、SRE 承認必須）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 1102px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第三経路: 全停止 (kill)
tier1 = 業務影響極大時のみ
Maintenance Page へ切替

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));
fill: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 465px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div: Phase 2-3 の 1 コマンド化（ops/scripts/rollback.sh）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 497px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Courier New'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
$ ./ops/scripts/rollback.sh \
--app tier1-workflow \
--revision \
--reason "canary AT error-rate fail"
# 内部実行:
# 1. git revert → PR 生成
# 2. SRE オンコール approval 検証
# 3. argocd app sync tier1-workflow --revision
# 4. kubectl argo rollouts undo workflow-rollout
# 5. PagerDuty incident に実行ログ自動添付

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 497px; margin-left: 622px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
四半期 rollback 演習
・staging 環境で 1 サービス抽選
・実時間計測 / 詰まりポイント記録
・15 分超過時は構成改善 PR 必須
・記録: ops/runbooks/quarterly/rollback-drill/
